description: Using GNU Octave, create a scatter plot from the pre-loaded UCI Iris dataset (iris.csv) located in ~/Documents/datasets/. The scatter plot should display Sepal Length (column 1) on the x-axis versus Petal Length (column 3) on the y-axis for all 150 flower samples. Color-code the points by species: use red for Iris-setosa, green for Iris-versicolor, and blue for Iris-virginica. Add the axis labels 'Sepal Length (cm)' and 'Petal Length (cm)', add the title 'Iris Dataset: Sepal vs Petal Length', add a legend showing species names, and save the completed plot as '/home/ga/plots/iris_scatter.png'.
